name: biedaalt-13
description: - **Сэдэв**: Personal Task Tracker (To-do list) - **Стек**: Node.js + Express + SQLite (better-sqlite3) - **Онцлог (3-5 feature)**:   1. Task CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete)   2. Due date тогтоох, засварлах   3. Priority (High, Medium, Low) -ээр ангилах   4. Төлөв (completed / not completed) чагнах   5. Filter: due date, priority, completed - **AI хэрэгсэл**: Claude (эсвэл таны хэрэглэж буй AI)
